title: Civil Engineering Technologists and Technicians
description: Apply theory and principles of civil engineering in planning, designing, and overseeing construction and maintenance of structures and facilities under the direction of engineering staff or physical scientists.

tasks.text: Calculate dimensions, square footage, profile and component specifications, and material quantities, using calculator or computer.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Read and review project blueprints and structural specifications to determine dimensions of structure or system and material requirements.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Draft detailed dimensional drawings and design layouts for projects to ensure conformance to specifications.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Confer with supervisor to determine project details such as plan preparation, acceptance testing, and evaluation of field conditions.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Analyze proposed site factors and design maps, graphs, tracings, and diagrams to illustrate findings.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare reports and document project activities and data.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Report maintenance problems occurring at project site to supervisor and negotiate changes to resolve system conflicts.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Inspect project site and evaluate contractor work to detect design malfunctions and ensure conformance to design specifications and applicable codes.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Conduct materials test and analysis, using tools and equipment and applying engineering knowledge.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Develop plans and estimate costs for installation of systems, utilization of facilities, or construction of structures.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop project budgets by estimating the cost of project activities.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Plan and conduct field surveys to locate new sites and analyze details of project sites.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Respond to public suggestions and complaints.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Negotiate with contractors on prices for new contracts or modifications to existing contracts.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
